title: Q@demowth #6932
definition:
Kedemoth = "eastern"

 1) one of the towns in the district east of the Dead Sea allotted to
    the tribe of Reuben and given to the Merarite Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kedemoth = "eastern"

 1) one of the towns in the district east of the Dead Sea allotted to
    the tribe of Reuben and given to the Merarite Levites

    NASB:  a city in Reuben
